By Mike Winder

          As the sun set on the thirteenth century, Thomas FitzMaurice Fitzgerald of Desmond, soon to be named Lord of Decies, produced a son.  Named for his father, Thomas FitzThomas …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond於1293年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 克里時，他的父親Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond32歲，母親Margaret De Berkeley19歲。他於1312年8月5日與Katharine de Burgh在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐格林卡斯特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年1月25日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林 卡素享年62歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里特拉利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond于1293年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 克里时，他的父亲Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond32岁，母亲Margaret De Berkeley19岁。他于1312年8月5日与Katharine de Burgh在爱尔兰庫迪 唐格林卡斯特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年1月25日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林 卡素享年62岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克里特拉利。

nameMeanings.name: FiztGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond was born in 1293, in Diocese of Kerry, Ireland, his father, Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond, was 32 and his mother, Margaret De Berkeley, was 19. He married Katharine de Burgh on 5 August 1312, in Greencastle, County Down, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 25 January 1355, in Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Tralee, County Kerry, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond est né en 1293, à Diocese of Kerry, Irlande, son père, Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Berkeley, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Katharine de Burgh le 5 août 1312, à Greencastle, County Down, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1355, à Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Tralee, County Kerry, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond 1293 in Diocese of Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond 32 und seine Mutter Margaret De Berkeley 19. Er hat am 5. August 1312 in Greencastle, County Down, Irland Katharine de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1355 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irland und wurde in Tralee, County Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond è nato il nel 1293 nel Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Berkeley, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Katharine de Burgh il 5 agosto 1312, nel Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 gennaio 1355, nel Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmondが1293年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ケリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmondは32歳，母Margaret De Berkeleyは19歳であった。1312年8月5日にアイルランドコウントイ ダウングレエンカストルでKatharine de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年1月25日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリン カストルで62歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ケリートラリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond(이)가 1293년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Berkeley(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1312년 8월 5일 아일랜드 카운티 다운 그린카스틀에서 Katharine de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 1월 25일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린 카스틀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 케리 트라리에 묻혔다.

mn.Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United: Stafford, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond nasceu em 1293, em Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Berkeley, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharine de Burgh em 5 de agosto de 1312, em Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1355, em Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond родился в 1293 г. в местности диосес оф кирри, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Berkeley, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharine de Burgh 5 августа 1312 г. в местности гринкастл, коунти доун, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 января 1355 г. в местности дублинь кастл, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности треили, коунти кирри, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl Maurice FitzThomas FiztGerald of Desmond nació en 1293, en Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret De Berkeley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Katharine de Burgh el 5 de agosto de 1312, en Greencastle, County Down, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de enero de 1355, en Dublin Castle, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda.
